description: Human-in-the-loop approval plugin for regulated operations. Provides four-eyes, exception review, and policy waiver workflows. Idempotent by requestId.

defaultTimeoutHours.description: Default number of hours before an un-actioned approval request is escalated or expired. Defaults to 24.

escalationEnabled.description: Whether timed-out requests are automatically escalated to a secondary approver. Defaults to false.

notificationWebhookUrl.description: Webhook URL for approval request notifications. Must be an env reference in production: env:APPROVAL_WEBHOOK_URL.

notificationWebhookSecret.description: HMAC secret for signing webhook payloads. Must be an env reference: env:APPROVAL_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
